# [Ω] SOVEREIGN CONTRACT: MUNINN_ORCHESTRATION
## Behavioral Specification (Gherkin)

**Feature**: Muninn Intelligence Orchestrator
  As the central daemon of the CorvusStar collective
  I must route queries between deterministic commands and the Antigravity Uplink
  So that the system remains responsive and context-aware.

  **Scenario**: Routing Deterministic Commands
    Given a query that matches a registered command in the registry
    When the daemon's routing engine processes the query
    Then the status must be "success"
    And the type must be "deterministic"
    And the target path must be correctly identified.

  **Scenario**: Routing Low-Confidence Queries (Alfred Uplink)
    Given a query that does not match any deterministic command (Low Score)
    When the daemon's routing engine processes the query
    Then the system must trigger the Antigravity Uplink
    And the response type must be "uplink"
    And the persona must default to "ALFRED".

  **Scenario**: Sleep Protocol Persistence
    Given an active session with traces in memory
    When the sleep protocol is executed
    Then all session traces must be persisted to the filesystem
    And the session context must be cleared.
